title: pseudoselago humilis
intro: Pseudoselago humilis, also known as the dwarf spiderwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Pseudoselago humilis can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
